Wyrdeer

#0898 Calyrex #0900 Kleavor
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Wyrdeer is a Normal/Psychic type Pokémon introduced in Generation 8.

Wyrdeer is a new Pokémon introduced in Pokémon Legends: Arceus. It is an evolution of Stantler.

Using the black orbs at the bases of its antlers, this Pokémon generates and unleashes psychic energy powerful enough to distort space.

Wyrdeer

Pokédex data

National № 0899
Type Normal Psychic
Species Big Horn Pokémon
Height 1.8 m (5′11″)
Weight 95.1 kg (209.7 lbs)
Abilities 1. Intimidate
2. Frisk
Sap Sipper (hidden ability)
Local № 0050 (Legends: Arceus)

Training

EV yield 1 Attack, 1 Sp. Atk
Catch rate 45 (5.9% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 263
Growth Rate Slow

Breeding

Egg Groups Field
Gender 50% male, 50% female
Egg cycles 20 (4,884–5,140 steps)

The ranges shown on the right are for a level 100 Pokémon. Maximum values are based on a beneficial nature, 252 EVs, 31 IVs; minimum values are based on a hindering nature, 0 EVs, 0 IVs.

Evolution chart

#0234
Stantler
Normal
(use Psyshield Bash 20 times in Agile Style)
#0899
Wyrdeer
Normal · Psychic

Pokédex entries

Legends: Arceus The black orbs shine with an uncanny light when the Pokémon is erecting invisible barriers. The fur shed from its beard retains heat well and is a highly useful material for winter clothing.

Moves learned by Wyrdeer

  • In other generations
  • 8
  • 9
Legends: Z-A Scarlet/Violet

Moves learnt by level up

Wyrdeer does not learn any level up moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by TM

Wyrdeer cannot be taught any TM moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Name origin

wyrd
fate, destiny
deer
a species of mammal with antlers
